title: canangium odoratum
intro: Canangium odoratum, also known as the fragrant canangium or yellow canangium, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Canangium odoratum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its extracts are used in traditional remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
